description: World's second-largest silicon wafer manufacturer with 20% global market share. Founded 1999 as JV between Mitsubishi Materials and Sumitomo Metal Industries. Supplies wafers to all major semiconductor manufacturers.

majorClients: Top 10 semiconductor companies are all customers
_externalRelationships.notes: Together with Shin-Etsu, controls 90% of advanced silicon wafer market. Only these two can make leading-edge wafers.

_metadata.notes: Q1 2026 forecast: operating loss 6B JPY. Recovery expected after 2026. High depreciation from capacity investments. 52-week range: 745-1,790 JPY.
